purpose: Validate normal Promptfoo scoring after recent harness fixes using exactly one fast liquid filtered no-cache cell.

runtimeBefore.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 344 MiB used, 5% utilization

command.scopeGuard: Exactly one LM Studio local Promptfoo cell; no retry, no other model, profile, or task was run.

promptfooLatestStatus.assessment: Promptfoo produced and wrote a fresh filtered result surface for the Stream 40 run.

validationAnswers.otherAssertionIssue: Promptfoo custom javascript assertions failed with `(output || "").includes is not a function`; this is distinct from the Stream 38 undefined.includes provider-call error.

comparisons.stream40Delta: Liquid produced a fresh no-cache Promptfoo result surface quickly on the filtered 4-case task, unlike Stream 39's qwen timeout/stale output. The row still failed 0/4 because the assertions errored on non-string output.

summaryAccounting.assessment: summarize-matrix selected the actual Stream 40 matrix JSONL, ignored the progress sidecar, and did not count the 0/4 no-pass row as completed.

runtimeAfterUnload.nvidiaSmi: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2080 Super with Max-Q Design, 8192 MiB total, 359 MiB used, 6% utilization

closedOrSharpened: The repaired Promptfoo runner path can launch a filtered liquid no-cache cell and write a fresh results/promptfoo-latest.json surface.
Promptfoo selected exactly 4 filtered build-synthetic-smoke cases and progress telemetry reached run_finished.
The Stream 38/39 undefined.includes provider-call error is absent from the Stream 40 row and progress telemetry.
summarize-matrix selected the real matrix JSONL and did not count the no-pass row as completed.
notClosed: Normal scoring is not passing: the liquid row is eval_failed with 0/4.
Promptfoo assertions still need investigation because the custom javascript checks report `(output || "").includes is not a function` on this fresh surface.

Subjective user review, final 3-solid selection, broad/full matrix coverage, qwen full-suite no-cache throughput, broad partial-profile quality/throughput, broad 31B/31B-QAT proof, and final verifier audit remain open.
